title: Rentokil RKLPSM97 Moth Balls (Pack of 20), Clear, 10.3x14.5x4.3 cm
description: From the manufacturer Rentokil Moth Balls are suitable for indoor use in contained areas such as drawers, wardrobes, cupboards and suitcases These low odour balls will kill clothes moths, their larvae and eggs. Contains Transfluthrin. Pack contains 20 moth balls
